Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Database Context PostgreSQL with three tables claims adjusters claim_events Schema Details Provided for each table Ideal Process Flow R A E P N C Receive Assign Evaluate Approve Notify Close Actual POWL Model Contains anomalies Loop E P XOR N or skip Partial Order R A loop xor C but also A C directly

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The loop allows repeated evaluation and approval cycles This could lead to multiple approvals re evaluations without clear triggers

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The model allows the process to bypass customer notification entirely via a silent transition

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The edge A C allows closing a claim right after assigning an adjuster completely bypassing evaluation approval and notification Also the lack of strict ordering between xor and C could allow C to happen concurrently or out of sequence

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Claims sometimes require re evaluation due to missing documents or disputed amounts leading to a manual rework loop However modeling it as a free loop without conditions might be a workaround for poor exception handling

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Business rule changes introduced a review approve review cycle for high value claims but it was poorly implemented as a generic loop

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For low value or internal claims notification might be deemed optional The modeler added a skip path to reduce workload but did not add conditions

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Technical limitation The notification system was down or unreliable so a bypass was hardcoded

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Miscommunication Compliance required notification but operations wanted flexibility leading to an ambiguous model

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Drop claims or rejected at intake might be closed early but the model lacks a proper rejection path so adjusters use the close button prematurely

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Process modeler error Added A C as a shortcut for testing or forgot to remove it

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: System allows manual override to close claims quickly bypassing controls

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: General Inadequate constraints in the modeling tool legacy process carryover or rushed implementation

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE

Text: Find claims where C occurs but E or P never occurred or C timestamp is before E or P
